title: Permission
description: Common v1 action-level permission contract used by RBAC enforcement.
$comment: Source: TECH-01 requires permissions to be action-level, backend-enforced, auditable, scoped, and guard-aware for risky actions.

permissionCode.description: Action permission code, for example batch.release, payment.confirm, evidence.accept, or product.activate.

riskLevel.description: Permission risk level. P0-critical permissions require evidence, audit, and release-gate awareness where applicable.
